title: Go 1.26 and AWS SDK for Go v2 Client Contract · Runtime Contract: Pointer Enum Document Types
summary: A service copies an SDK v1 tutorial, floats module versions, shares request options incorrectly, and treats generated Go types as runtime validation. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pointer enum document types increment in pinned Go and AWS SDK v2 client contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use SDK pointers, enums, document types, output metadata, paginators, and nil handling without losing API semantics.
Load immutable shared configuration once, construct scoped clients, pass context, and assign transport and credential lifetimes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
